//: Responsibility: Defines the ShopSphere monorepo workspaces and shared development scripts.
name: shopsphere

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @shopsphere/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @shopsphere/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @shopsphere/backend && npm run build --workspace @shopsphere/frontend
